productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Signal Cut pressure carry to Fork Relay
lastRefinementUnit.result: Signal Cut now requires one readable left-build angle and target-directed speed window before the existing cable launcher grants a shortcut-only Fork Relay assist, then confirms the one-launch landing while preserving retained pressure and the unchanged Shelter Rise path.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Signal Cut pressure-carry feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: The 46-pressure Signal Cut route now teaches a left build, opens one amber release cue only at the authored angle and directed speed, lands Fork Relay in the baseline 37 ticks with explicit fire and landing feedback, and grants no assist or event to Shelter Rise.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, all route JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed the safe branch and the full shortcut through Fork Relay, Stormlock, Cacheline, Windglass, and original anchor-11; exercised real failure and keyboard retry; checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure; held bounded DOM, canvas, descriptor, and scene counts; and reported zero console messages. Human View rejected a compositor-torn capture, promoted each UI surface above the unpromoted canvas, and passed the recaptured first screen, build cue, amber window, landing, rejoin, and failure states with diagnostics closed. Matched fresh-browser active-play performance held from 28.42 to 28.81 FPS with p95 at 50 ms and no count growth.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Pending production commit and fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Make the Stormlock vent drain retained pressure visibly during the reel instead of snapping only on lock, using the existing pressure owner and no new meter.
